markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new content strategy and its impact on organic recruitment.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Shifted from high-volume content to a principles-first, quality-over-quantity approach. This new workflow uses AI with human-in-the-loop controls to ensure brand authenticity.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**New Forecast Needed:** The pivot requires a revised forecast to manage leadership expectations. The new goal is sustainable, long-term brand building, not short-term traffic spikes.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [**Video Testimonial Initiative:** Proposed creating a high-quality video testimonial for a top-tier coder to attract expert talent. GrowthX will handle production, pending Surge's approval of a candidate.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

## Topics

### The Strategic Pivot: Quality Over Quantity

  - [**Rationale:** To build a sustainable, long-term talent pipeline and reduce reliance on paid ads.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [**New Content Engine:** A principles-first workflow built by Ishmael (Managing Editor & DevOps Engineer) to ensure brand authenticity.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Process:** Rooted in Surge's "artifacts" (e.g., Edwin's vision) → Human-in-the-loop assignment brief → Automated micro-checks → Uniqueness gate → Final human review.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Content Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Rewrites:** Ramping to 10–15 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Expert Injections:** Testing adding firsthand experience from Surge's SME pool (e.g., developers, security experts) to articles.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [**Visuals:** All meta images replaced; in-article graphics are being added.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [**FAQs:** Completed and ready for Surge's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

### Impact & Forecasting

  - [**Growth Plateau:** Organic traffic has temporarily plateaued during the content rewrite phase.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [**Sign-up Quality:** Recent sign-ups are less developer-focused, likely due to the general nature of the initial content.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [**New Forecast:** A revised forecast is required to align leadership expectations with the new strategy's goals:](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
      - [**Goal:** Sustainable, long-term brand building, not short-term traffic spikes.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
      - [**Metric:** Impact on recruitment across all cohorts (e.g., Generalists vs. Physicists).](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)

### New Workstream: Video Testimonials

  - [**Proposal:** Create a high-quality, documentary-style video testimonial for a top-tier coder.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Goal:** Attract expert talent by showcasing the Surge brand and its role in AGI development.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**Production Plan:** GrowthX will manage the entire process, including flying their videographer (Will) to the talent's location.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**Expansion:** This initiative can be expanded to other cohorts (e.g., financiers) and video formats.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason Gong:**](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
      - [Update the one-pager with the new content strategy's forecast and rationale.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [**JP Salazar:**](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [Identify 3 top-performing coder brand ambassadors (do not contact).](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [Share the draft "how to work with relatively low feedback" article with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**Liz Kushnereit:**](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
      - [Send the new FAQs to Surge for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [**Nancy Flournoy:**](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [Share examples of past Surge videos to help define future video strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/SD9mMyfs1tQP42VkAN3Qc-e7EPkb5qMH?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
